item.name: Marbled Hatchetfish
item.description:
According to Yok Huy myth, this wavekin was once a mighty warrior's axe, transformed by its wielder's grief.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The Yok Huy tell of a mighty warrior of yore who, beset by grief, cast down their axe. The weapon transformed into a majestic wavekin bearing marbled scales, its intricate patterns a manifestation of the warrior's agony.
